title: SQL Formatter Style Template
description: A flat (non-per-clause) formatting style template consumed by the sql-formatter core engine.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for this template, e.g. "jane-default". Used for lookup and by `extends`.

description.description: Optional longer description of when/why to use this template.

version.description: Semver of this template. Bump when the style rules change.

schemaVersion.description: Semver of this schema itself, so older templates remain interpretable after the schema evolves.

dialect.description: Target SQL dialect. "generic" applies dialect-agnostic rules only.

extends.description: id of a base template this one inherits from. Fields set here override the base; unset fields fall back to the base's resolved value.

confidence.description: Only present when type is "inferred". Per-field confidence scores (0-1) from the style-inference engine, keyed by dotted path into `style` (e.g. "casing.keywords").

style.description: The actual formatting rules. Flat: one setting per concern, applied uniformly across the whole script (no per-clause overrides yet).

mode.description: "indent": level-based indentation (indentation.char/size per nesting level). "keywordAlign": clause keywords (SELECT/FROM/WHERE/JOIN/ON/AND/...) are right-padded so their last character lines up in a shared column per statement/subquery scope ("river style"); indentation.char/size is still used for nesting within that scope (CASE/WHEN, nested groups).

size.description: Width in characters (or number of tabs) per indent level.

lineWidth.description: Max line length before wrapping is triggered.

forceNewlinePerClause.description: Each major clause (SELECT, FROM, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, ...) starts on its own line.

inlineShortStatements.description: Allow a statement under lineWidth to stay on one line even if forceNewlinePerClause is true.

onePerLine.description: Column/expression lists (SELECT list, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, IN (...)) break one item per line.

wrapThresholdItems.description: Minimum item count before a list is wrapped, when onePerLine is false and wrapping is otherwise triggered by lineWidth.

alignAfterComma.description: Align wrapped list items into a column after the comma.

multiConditionIndent.description: Extra indent levels for a multi-condition ON clause.

style.description: AND/OR placed at the start (leading) or end (trailing) of the line when a WHERE/ON clause wraps.

indentContinuation.description: Indent continuation lines of a wrapped boolean chain one extra level.

onePerLine.description: Each CTE in a WITH clause starts on its own line.

blankLineBetween.description: Insert a blank line between successive CTEs.

subqueryOpenParenSameLine.description: Subquery's opening paren stays on the calling line vs. moves to its own line.

aliases.description: Align AS aliases into a column across a list.

assignments.description: Align = signs into a column (e.g. in UPDATE ... SET or INSERT column lists).

forceQuoteIdentifiers.description: Always quote identifiers, even when not required (e.g. no reserved word/mixed case).

quoteChar.description: Quote style for identifiers. "none" leaves existing quoting untouched.

aroundCtes.description: Blank line before/after the WITH block as a whole.

alwaysAppendSemicolon.description: Append a trailing semicolon to every statement, even if the input omitted it.
